workflow.name: Qualify and route inbound leads with Claude, Gmail, Slack and Google Sheets
workflow.description:
# Overview
Stop wasting time on leads that will never convert. This workflow scores every inbound form submission 1-10 using Claude AI, then automatically replies and routes based on fit — hot leads get an instant email and Slack alert, warm leads get a follow-up prompt, cold leads get a polite decline.

## How it works

Lead fills out your built-in n8n contact form
Claude AI scores them 1-10 against your ideal customer profile
Hot (7-10) → Slack alert + personalised email + logged to Sheets
Warm (4-6) → holding reply email + logged to Sheets
Cold (1-3) → polite decline email + logged to Sheets


## Setup steps

Copy the form URL from the Inbound Lead Form node and share it as your contact form
Add your Anthropic API key to the Claude Sonnet sub-node
Connect Gmail to the three reply nodes and update the email signatures
Connect Slack to Notify Team - Hot Lead — or right-click and Disable it
Create a Google Sheet with headers: Timestamp, Name, Email, Company, Size, Message, Score, Tier, Reasoning and connect it in all three Log nodes
Edit the scoring prompt in Score Lead Intent to describe your ideal customer

workflow.name: AI Lead Qualification Agent: Auto-Score, Route and Reply with Claude

parameters.content:
## AI Lead Qualification Agent: Auto-Score, Route and Reply with Claude

Stop wasting time on leads that will never convert. This workflow reads every inbound form submission, uses Claude AI to score the lead 1-10 against your ideal customer profile, and automatically takes the right action — all without you lifting a finger.

### How it works

1. A lead submits your n8n Form (or any connected form tool).
2. Claude AI reads the submission and assigns a score from 1 to 10 based on fit, intent, and company size.
3. Hot leads (score 7-10) get an instant personalised reply email and a Slack alert to your team.
4. Warm leads (score 4-6) get a softer reply and are added to a follow-up sequence.
5. Cold leads (score 1-3) receive a polite decline email.
6. Every lead — regardless of score — is logged to Google Sheets with the score and reasoning.

### Setup steps

- [ ] **n8n Form** — The form is built into this workflow. Copy the form URL from the Form Trigger node and embed or share it as your contact form.
- [ ] **Claude AI** — Click the Claude Sonnet sub-node under Score Lead Intent, add a new Anthropic credential, and paste your API key from console.anthropic.com.
- [ ] **Gmail** — Connect your Gmail account in the three email nodes: Hot Lead Reply, Warm Lead Reply, and Cold Lead Reply.
- [ ] **Slack** — Connect your Slack account in Notify Team - Hot Lead and select your channel (e.g. sales-leads). Right-click and Disable this node if you do not use Slack.
- [ ] **Google Sheets** — Create a sheet with headers: Timestamp, Name, Email, Company, Message, Score, Tier, Reasoning. Connect your Google account in Log Lead to Sheets.
- [ ] Update the AI scoring prompt inside Score Lead Intent to describe your ideal customer profile.
- [ ] Activate the workflow and submit a test form entry to verify all three branches work.

### Customization

Adjust the hot/warm/cold score thresholds in the Route by Score node to match your standards. Swap Claude Sonnet for Claude Haiku to reduce API costs if volume is high.

## Capture inbound lead

An n8n Form collects the lead's name, email, company, and message. No third-party form tool needed — the URL is generated automatically when you activate the workflow.

## Score lead with Claude AI

Claude Sonnet reads the submission and returns a score (1-10) plus a one-line reasoning. Edit the system prompt in this node to describe your ideal customer so Claude scores against your actual criteria.

## Route by score

Splits leads into three tiers: Hot (7-10), Warm (4-6), and Cold (1-3). Each tier triggers a different set of actions below.

## Hot lead branch (score 7-10)

This lead matches your ideal profile. Sends an instant personalised reply email, fires a Slack alert to your team, and logs everything to Google Sheets.

Slack is optional — right-click the Notify Team node and Disable if unused.

## Warm lead branch (score 4-6)

Promising but not yet a clear fit. Sends a friendly holding reply that sets expectations, then logs to Google Sheets for manual follow-up.

## Cold lead branch (score 1-3)

Not a fit right now. Sends a short, respectful decline email so the lead gets a response and your inbox stays clean. Logged to Sheets for records.

parameters.formDescription: Tell us a bit about yourself and what you are looking for.

parameters.message:
Hi {{ $json.lead_name }},

Thanks for reaching out — this is exactly the kind of challenge we love solving.

Based on what you have shared, I think there is a real opportunity here. I would love to jump on a quick call to learn more about your situation and show you what is possible.

You can book a time that works for you here: YOUR_CALENDAR_LINK

Looking forward to connecting.

Best,
[Your Name]
[Your Company]
parameters.subject: Re: Your enquiry — lets find a time to talk

parameters.message:
Hi {{ $json.lead_name }},

Thank you for getting in touch — great to hear from you.

I have had a look at what you have shared and I would love to learn a bit more before we set up a call. Could you tell me a little more about the current challenge you are trying to solve and what a good outcome would look like for you?

Looking forward to your reply.

Best,
[Your Name]
[Your Company]
parameters.subject: Re: Your enquiry

parameters.message:
Hi {{ $json.lead_name }},

Thank you for reaching out and taking the time to get in touch.

After reviewing your enquiry, I do not think we are the right fit for where you are right now — but I appreciate you considering us and wish you all the best in finding the right solution.

If things change down the line, do not hesitate to reach back out.

All the best,
[Your Name]
[Your Company]
parameters.subject: Re: Your enquiry

user.name: Akshay Chug
user.bio:
Akshay is a B2B automation specialist helping business owners eliminate manual backend processes through AI-driven workflow automation. With deep expertise in n8n, AI agents, and end-to-end pipeline building, he helps companies automate cold outreach, lead follow-up, and core operations — without adding headcount.

Founder of Sunsky AI.
